subcodes.first_line: O God of the worlds, Who hast manifested Thyself through the Most Great Name! I beseech Thee by the ocean of Thy knowledge, the sun of Thy Manifestation, and the heaven of Thy bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اله العالم و الظاهر بالاسم الاعظم اسئلک ببحر علمک و شمس ظهورک و سماء جودک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for healing, @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Greatest Name
